columns.extraction_plan: Abstract (page 1) and Figure A1 (page 16) provide median OS and hazard ratio but not a specific OS rate (percentage) for the overall treatment arm. Figure 2 (page 6) provides subgroup data, not overall population data.

Abstract (page 1) and Figure A1 (page 16) provide median OS and hazard ratio but not a specific OS rate (percentage) for the overall control arm. Figure 2 (page 6) provides subgroup data, not overall population data.
Figure A1 (page 16) reports median OS as 'NE' and hazard ratio (HR, 0.71; 95% CI, 0.59 to 0.85) in text (page 2), but no specific OS rate (percentage) is provided.

Figure 2A (page 6) provides an approximate OS rate of 55% at the latest follow-up of 57 months for the high-volume treatment group.
Figure 2A (page 6) provides an approximate OS rate of 45% at the latest follow-up of 57 months for the high-volume control group.
Figure 2B (page 6) provides an approximate OS rate of 85% at the latest follow-up of 54 months for the low-volume treatment group.
Figure 2B (page 6) provides an approximate OS rate of 75% at the latest follow-up of 54 months for the low-volume control group.
